page_metadata.biotools__summary: Database of indels in protein structures and their flanking regions. Contains indels with flanking regions extracted from structural alignment pairs of non-redundant domains from superfamilies. Provides access to information about indels and their flanking regions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Database of indels in protein structures and their flanking regions. Contains indels with flanking regions extracted from structural alignment pairs of non-redundant domains from superfamilies. Provides access to information about indels and their flanking regions.
